title: Make run_plan operation_id scope stable
goal: Implement a bounded issue #13 idempotency slice so explicit operation_id on run_plan uses a stable run scope and versioned per-slot assign_next request_nonce values, reducing duplicate assignment risk when run_plan is retried while allowing later plan versions to continue progressing.
requiredInputs: Existing operation_scoped_run_id and fill_slots per-slot nonce pattern
permissions: Modify run_plan helper/wiring and focused tests
Run cargo fmt/check/test and selfdev build
completionConditions: run_plan derives stable run_id from explicit operation_id when run_id is omitted, preserving run scope across retries.
run_plan internal assign_next calls use deterministic versioned per-slot request_nonce values when operation_id is provided.
run_plan without operation_id preserves current fresh run_id and non-idempotent assignment behavior.
Focused tests cover run_plan operation_id run_id and versioned slot nonce derivation.
cargo fmt/check/test, git diff --check, selfdev build/reload, governance, commit, and push pass.
failureTaxonomy: Using unversioned slot nonces that block later run_plan phases after plan progress
Adding broad run_plan persistence instead of bounded tool-level retry stability
notes: Keep this additive and tool-level: reuse existing CommAssignNext idempotency. Version nonce by PlanGraphStatus.version so later phases can still assign newly ready tasks.
